meta.scenario: deep house same key, 5.2 BPM gap, BPM decrease, groove exit

transition_arc: Same key (7B/F major) — harmonic blending is safe throughout. BPM decreases (117→112), subtle cool-down. T2 from_bar=8 skips near-silent intro. other:0.6 brings T2 chords in while T1 chords still fading — listener hears harmonic reinforcement. Even same-key: bass swap is mandatory (BPM mismatch would muddy low end).

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 0: gentle deep house groove, kick+bass+warm pads, RMS 0.40
T1 bar 56: drums=0.5, harmonic=0.5, rms=0.42 — mid-groove, steady
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: soft percussion, bass=0.0, harmonic=0.2 (pads filtering in)
annotated_actions.why: T1 at steady mid-groove energy, not at a peak and not at a breakdown. Exit here while energy is stable.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: hi-hat pattern + clap, no kick yet, warm pad starting
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=8 skips near-silent intro. other:0.6 is safe because same key — T2 warm pads blend with T1 pads. bass:0.0 mandatory even same-key (different native BPMs would clash in low end).

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 64: bass=0.15, drums=0.25, rms=0.22 — fading
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: bass appearing (0.3), kick fully present
annotated_actions.why: T2 bass has entered. Remove T1 bass via swap to prevent muddy low end.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 24: full deep house groove at 112.3 BPM, warm bass + kick, RMS 0.45
annotated_actions.why: T2 groove established. BPM reduction (117→112) creates relaxed feel.
